kept.text:
BREAKING $PLTR| $230 PT| Outperform Rating 🚀

Wedbush's analyst @DivesTech reiterated Outperform rating and maintains $230 Price Target on @PalantirTech.

Palantir is reporting its FY1Q26 results on Monday May 4th after the bell where we expect to see another robust quarter driven by the expanding use-cases for the company’s AIP as demand accelerates across both government and commercial for its offerings with PLTR being at the forefront of the AI Revolution. 

We continue to believe Palantir has the potential to be a trillion-dollar market cap company in the next few years as the AI Revolution takes hold and the company sees accelerating demand for its AI products and services. We maintain our Outperform rating and $230 price target with the company remaining on the Ives AI 30 list.

We believe the Street’s top-line estimate of $1.54 billion as beatable with US commercial revenue expected to accelerate beyond the 139% y/y seen in the last quarter as AIP continues to be at the center of delivering value to customers with the Street still underestimating the company’s commercial efforts. PLTR continues to see unprecedented demand for AIP based on our recent checks in the field across both commercial and government landscapes by taking AI solutions that solve meaningful problems across organizations at enterprise scale driving new customer conversions and existing deal expansions. 

When speaking more with prospective customers, the majority discussed how they heard about Palantir’s technology and the value these technologies were able to provide through word of mouth after other partners went all in on Palantir, but many were shocked after seeing the use cases through demos giving us more confidence that many still don’t fully understand the full value that Karp & Co. bring to the table. We also note that the company’s bottom-line expectation of $870 million - $874 million for FY1Q26 are hittable despite aggressive investments into product pipeline, elite technical hiring, and AIP with the company accelerating its Rule of 40 profile beyond 127% seen in the prior quarter."

quoted_tweet.text:
⚡️Oppenheimer bullish on Palantir $PLTR, initiates with an Outperform

Oppenheimer initiated coverage of Palantir with an Outperform rating and $200 price target. 

Behind the firm's bullish stance is its view that custom applications based on an Ontology-anchored system have considerable switching costs once embedded, creating a highly sticky platform; Palantir is positively aligned to the growing spend in defense technology by the U.S. and its allies; and the company is rapidly expanding within the traditional commercial enterprise organizations and establishing itself as the "best-in-class" vendor for its market segment. 

While Palantir's high valuation remains a concern for the investment community, Oppenheimer sees it as justified as Palantir is rapidly becoming the leading platform for AI application deployment across the Government and Commercial sectors.

$PLTR Wedbush reiterates Palantir stock rating on AI demand strength 💥🦾

2026-04-29
Wedbush reiterated an Outperform rating and $230 price target on Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) shares ahead of the company’s first-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings report scheduled for Monday, May 4. 🦾

The firm expects Palantir to report revenue of $1.54 billion for the quarter, driven by expanding use cases for the company’s Artificial Intelligence Platform across government and commercial customers. The company posted impressive 56% revenue growth over the last twelve months, supported by gross profit margins of 82%. U.S. commercial revenue is expected to accelerate beyond the 139% year-over-year growth seen in the prior quarter. 💥

Wedbush said demand for AIP remains strong based on recent field checks across commercial and government sectors. The firm noted that prospective customers are learning about Palantir’s technology through word of mouth from existing partners. 🎯

The firm said Palantir’s bottom-line expectation of $870 million to $874 million for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 is achievable despite investments in product development, technical hiring, and AIP. The company’s Rule of 40 profile exceeded 127% in the prior quarter... 🐂

Wedbush maintains Palantir on its AI 30 list and said the company has potential to reach a trillion-dollar market capitalization as AI adoption accelerates. 🔥

kept.text:
When Palantir gives their Q1 Earnings next week we may get an update about one of my favorite stats: the % of hospital beds $PLTR powers. This is a commercial figure. Military wise Pili powered medics are here and are an enormous part of NGC2. Army Vantage & MSS

The Army Medical Enterprise: Embracing Decision Advantage

Data-centric transformation starts by acknowledging that Army Medicine must operate from the Army’s primary data platform, Army Vantage, which is a cultural shift from how Army Medicine has traditionally managed enterprise data. Consolidation of trusted and timely data in Vantage enables the development of medical data products, providing leaders at all echelons with actionable insight to enhance mission effectiveness.

Adopting the Scrum framework, with support from the Army’s Offices of the Chief Information Officer, the Chief Technology Officer, and the Chief of Staff of the Army, U.S. Army Medical Command (MEDCOM) developed the Medical Roles of Care Dashboard in under five weeks using source system data from Integrated Personnel and Pay System–Army, Global Combat Support System–Army, Defense Readiness Reporting System–Army, and the Army organization server. 

The Medical Roles of Care Dashboard provides a holistic overview of active duty, Guard, and Reserve medical personnel assigned to Roles 1 through 4, unit locations, medical evacuation platform slants for the HH60 helicopter, the M1133/M113 personnel carrier, the M997A3 ambulance, and critical medical equipment slants for defibrillators, ventilators, and x-rays. By the time this article is published, the data product for this dashboard should be registered in the Army Data Catalog, reducing duplication of effort to create similar insights across the force.

Vantage data also feeds advanced analytics and frontier algorithms both within and outside the Vantage platform. Integration of personnel and equipment data with live casualty data from the Battlefield Assisted Trauma Distributed Observation Kit–Joint (BATDOK-J) into command-and-control platforms, such as Maven Smart System (MSS), enhances battlefield situational awareness, improving patient regulation, allocation of evacuation assets, and visibility into medical logistics supply chains. Army Medicine embraced continuous transformation throughout 2025 to achieve BATDOK-J integration.

In April 2025, the 101st Airborne Division provided feedback on the shortcomings of BATDOK-J to operate on the Army’s Integrated Tactical Network. MEDCOM worked with U.S. Army Western Hemisphere Command (formerly Forces Command), joint, and Army organizations to accelerate a fix. In September 2025, a short five months later, MEDCOM and the 82nd Airborne Division successfully transported live BATDOK-J data through the division’s Tactical Assault Kit server into MSS at the Joint Readiness Training Center. As BATDOK-J scales across the Army in 2026, further integration with MSS will enable decisions on triage, evacuation, reconstitution, resourcing, and relative combat power.

Finally, continued integration into NGC2 ensures that health service support and force health protection data inform tactical, operational, and strategic decision making. Exercises such as the 4th Infantry Division’s Ivy Sting, the 25th Infantry Division’s Lightning Surge series of experimentation, and the 101st Airborne Division’s Lethal Eagle will refine the delivery and consumption of medical data in NGC2’s data, integration, and application layers

kept.text:
$PLTR Baird reiterates Palantir stock Outperform rating ahead of earnings 🦾🔥

2026-04-29
Baird reiterated an Outperform rating and $200.00 price target on Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) shares ahead of the company’s first-quarter earnings report. 💥

The firm expects Palantir to deliver strong first-quarter results when it reports on Monday, May 4. Revenue growth is likely to accelerate for the 11th consecutive quarter, Baird said. The company posted impressive 56% revenue growth over the last twelve months, reaching $4.48 billion in total revenue. 📈

The firm anticipates upside in both US Commercial and US Government segments. Baird projects $5.76 billion in free cash flow for 2027, with a reasonable upside case of $7.5 billion. 🦾

The firm believes 2026 and 2027 estimates will continue to move higher. Baird views the stock’s recent digestion period as a good opportunity to purchase the growth asset... 🐂

In other recent news, Palantir Technologies Inc. secured a significant $300 million contract with the U.S. Department of Agriculture. This Blanket Purchase Agreement is intended to support the National Farm Security Action Plan and modernize service delivery to American farmers. The initiative, known as "One Farmer, One File," aims to streamline access to USDA services and improve operational efficiency. 🚜

Additionally, the Federal Aviation Administration has chosen Palantir, alongside Thales SA and Air Space Intelligence Inc., to develop a new AI tool for air traffic management, as part of a broader effort to modernize the nation’s air traffic control system. ✈️

On the financial front, Rosenblatt has reiterated its buy rating for Palantir, citing strong AI growth momentum. The firm maintains a $200 price target and anticipates strong earnings results from Palantir’s upcoming report on May 4. These developments highlight Palantir’s ongoing expansion in both government contracts and AI-driven solutions. 🎯
🇺🇸🌐🦾🐂📈🔮🔥

quoted_tweet.text:
$PLTR "Secret Sauce" is the 🐐
Continuous Margin Expansion Loop- The Hack🧵

Palantir achieved its "insane" margin expansion (adjusted operating margins climbing from low/negative pre-2023 levels to 39% in FY2024, 50% in FY2025, and a record 57% in Q4 2025, with GAAP operating margins hitting 41% in Q4 2025) through a deliberate, multi-year shift from a high-touch, services-heavy custom-integration model to a highly scalable, product-led software platform business.
Palantir culture tackles the most complex problem as a platform, engineers are encouraged to build softwares that are 5-10 years ahead. This was 2 decades in the seed planting to get us to where we are. 

1. The "secret sauce"

Palantir has always operated with a multi-year (or decade-long) time horizon, rather than chasing quarterly features or easy wins. Dr. Karp and FDE are explicitly encouraged to tackle the hardest, most complex problems that others avoid   things like integrating messy, real-world enterprise/government data at massive scale while maintaining governance, auditability, and "magical" frontline outcomes

When institutions realized Palantir software is Free, where Palantir enables massive saving for enterprises across the world and the US govt, Valuation earns a premium. To be more precise, highest margin in the SaaS or any company to be frank. We are talking about Operating Margin, not even try to debate Gross Margin here. 

This "build far ahead" approach meant years of negative/low margins and heavy spending on elite talent + forward-deployed engineers. But it created a moat: Once the Ontology is in place for a customer, additional use cases, agents, and expansions have near-zero marginal cost. That's the core of the recent margin ramp (software-like scalability on top of complex problems).

2.  The 2023 Inflection: AIP Launch + Bootcamp Model (Product-Led Acceleration)

~AIP launched in 2023 was the game-changer. It layers generative AI/LLMs directly onto the Ontology + Gotham/Foundry. This lets customers rapidly build/deploy AI "agents" and workflows that are grounded in real business rules (no hallucinations), with full governance, provenance, and auditability.

~AIP Bootcamps (rolled out alongside AIP): These are 5-day intensive, hands-on sessions where Palantir engineers work with the customer's team on the customer's own data to build live, production-ready AI use cases/workflows. 

~Replaces months-long custom pilots with quick, low/no-cost demos from original sale phase
Acquire - Expand - Scale. 
This Dramatically shortens sales cycles and conversion. Shifts to product-led growth, customers see immediate value and expand organically (one energy customer scaled from ~$4M to >$20M ACV in a year via 4 → 280+ use cases).
Basically AIP - Scale now!

~Ontology as the reusable moat: Once the semantic layer is built for the first use case(s), every additional app, agent, or workflow has near-zero marginal cost. This drives insane net dollar retention (139% in Q4 2025) and within-account expansion without proportional new spending. 

3. "Secret Sauce" results in Operating Leverage that drove this continous margin expansion that is unheard of

High gross margins on software: ~82–86% adjusted (subscriptions + O&M). Professional services became a smaller % of revenue as platforms scaled. US commercial revenue exploded (+137% YoY in Q4 2025 to $507M; +109% FY2025). Overall revenue: +29% in 2024, +59% in 2025, +70% in Q4 2025. Operating expenses as % of revenue dropped sharply ( from 87% in 2022 to 69% in 2024; sales & marketing fell as % of revenue even as growth accelerated). 

People are the biggest expense (not massive fixed capex like hyperscalers). AI productivity tools + reusable Ontology mean fewer FDEs needed per dollar of revenue. They continue hiring elite talent but invest in AIP while still expanding margins.

Palantir often eats upfront implementation risk and gets paid on measurable results (Airbus 33% production boost, bp triple-digit ROI). This builds trust and sticks customers, but the platform now delivers those results faster/cheaper.

Conclusion: 

Under Dr. Alex Karp’s leadership, Palantir has engineered a fundamentally different software model, one where the platform is effectively “free” to customers upfront, years ahead of competitors, and engineered for outsized, compounding growth that few (if any) enterprise software companies can match.

Karp’s long-term, first-principles vision rooted in building for the hardest problems, maintaining a high-talent-density culture that tolerates short-term pain for decade-long payoffs, and refusing to commoditize created the Ontology and AIP as a reusable “operating system” for real-world operations. Customers get immediate, production-grade AI value through 5-day AIP Bootcamps without massive upfront commitments or risky pilots. Palantir absorbs the implementation risk, demonstrates measurable outcomes on the customer’s own data ( 33% production lifts, triple-digit ROI), and only scales revenue as value is proven

This “software is free until it prints results” approach flips traditional SaaS economics: low customer acquisition friction, near-75% bootcamp conversion, and explosive within-account expansion (139%+ NDR) with minimal additional cost. The platform’s 5–10 year technical lead governance, provenance, agentic workflows grounded in real ontology means competitors are still selling PowerPoint while Palantir deploys live digital twins.

While 🦖peers chase incremental AI features and wrestle with integration debt, Dr.Karp bet on building far ahead has produced higher growth velocity, superior margins, and stickier customer relationships. The model doesn’t just win deals it turns customers into ecosystems that expand organically for years.

I will leave you with one Dr. Karp quote: 

“The culture of this company has always been and continues to be the precondition for the creation of our software... It is that culture that allows and encourages some four thousand people to band together in shifting and often odd amalgamations to build something of value to themselves and to the world.”

Video Source: Q1 2025 Earning Call

04/30/2026
Oppenheimer on Thursday initiated coverage of Palantir Technologies (PLTR) with an outperform rating ahead of the software maker's first quarter earnings report due Monday. Palantir stock edged up amid the news.

Oppenheimer analyst Param Singh in a report gave Palantir stock a price target of 200. That's roughly 40% above where shares in the maker of data analytics software are now trading.

"While Palantir's high valuation remains a concern for the investment community, we see it as justified as Palantir is rapidly becoming the leading platform for AI application deployment across the government and commercial sectors," Singh said in a report.

He added that Palantir's "custom applications based on an ontology (digital-mapping)-anchored system have considerable switching costs once embedded, creating a highly sticky platform."

"Palantir is rapidly expanding within the traditional commercial enterprise organizations and establishing itself as the "best-in-class" vendor for this market segment," Singh said...

kept.text:
$PLTR Partner LG CNS Reports Strong Q1 Revenue and Profit: "In particular, we are strengthening our AX (AI transformation) business by offering various services where multi-agents based on agentic AI collaborate autonomously." BizChosun also reports that LG CNS has supplied ChatGPT Enterprise since February and secured about ten corporations as customers, and that cooperation with Palantir includes forward deployed engineer teams to identify AX projects. 🦾🔮💥

April 30, 2026
Reporting by BizChosun states that LG CNS posted first-quarter revenue of 1.315 trillion won, up 8.6% year-on-year, and operating profit of 94.2 billion won, up 19.4%, driven by growth in its AI and cloud businesses. According to BizChosun, revenue from AI and cloud rose 6.7% to 765.4 billion won, roughly 58% of total revenue. 

BizChosun includes direct quotes from an LG CNS official: "In AI, we have diversified our portfolio across all industries..." and "In particular, we are strengthening our AX (AI transformation) business by offering various services where multi-agents based on agentic AI collaborate autonomously." The report also cites recent deals including ChatGPT Enterprise deployments and collaboration with Palantir, and large data-center projects. 🦾🔮

According to BizChosun, LG CNS reported first-quarter revenue of 1.315 trillion won, a year-on-year increase of 8.6%, and operating profit of 94.2 billion won, up 19.4%. Reporting by BizChosun states that revenue from AI and cloud rose 6.7% year-on-year to 765.4 billion won, representing about 58% of total revenue. 

BizChosun quotes an LG CNS official saying, "In AI, we have diversified our portfolio across all industries, including public, defense, finance, manufacturing, pharmaceuticals and bio, shipbuilding, and defense industry," and, "In particular, we are strengthening our AX (AI transformation) business by offering various services where multi-agents based on agentic AI collaborate autonomously." 🦾

BizChosun also reports that LG CNS has supplied ChatGPT Enterprise since February and secured about ten corporations as customers, and that cooperation with Palantir includes forward deployed engineer teams to identify AX projects. The report further notes cloud-related wins, including projects worth over 1 trillion won at the Samsong data center and a modular AI data center offering. 🔥

Editorial analysis - technical context
Companies deploying enterprise AI transformation (AX) typically combine cloud partnerships, enterprise LLM access, and systems-integration services. For system integrators, revenue shifts toward recurring software and managed services and higher-margin cloud design-build-operate (DBO) contracts commonly increase gross-profit contribution. Multi-agent and agentic architectures cited in the reporting align with a broader industry move to orchestration layers that coordinate specialized models and tool use rather than monolithic large-model deployments.

Industry context
Observed patterns in similar transitions show that tie-ups with hyperscalers and specialized vendors like Palantir often serve two roles: accelerating technical delivery on data and orchestration, and providing commercial channels to large enterprise customers. For practitioners, the mix of ChatGPT Enterprise deployments plus DBO data-center projects underscores the ongoing coupling of model access, data infrastructure, and integration work in enterprise AI rollouts.

What to watch
Indicators an observer can track include reported growth in recurring AI/cloud revenue as a share of total revenue, the pipeline of AX projects converting to long-term managed-services contracts, and announced customer wins for ChatGPT Enterprise or similar enterprise LLM products. Market signals from partners such as Palantir and hyperscalers about joint deployments will also show whether integration efforts are scaling beyond pilot phases...
🇰🇷🦾🔮🔥

tweet.text:
パラ友各位

おはようございます。
決算も近づいてきました。
$PLTR を強気にまとめてみます。

お時間ある方はご一読下さい🐕
$PLTR #palantir #パランティア #米国株

まず、ポイントは「単なるAIブーム銘柄ではなく、政府・軍・大企業の“AI運用インフラ”としての地位を急速に固めてる」という点ね。

特に重要なのは、株価が年初来で果てしなく下落してる一方で、事業面ではむしろ大型契約や導入拡大が加速してること。

つまり、マーケット的には冷え冷えなのに業績は熱々に強くなってる。
ということは、「もし決算が想定以上なら株価の反応が大きくなるのではないか」とか考えてる😏

で、転換点は前回のQ4決算。

▷売上は前年比70%増の14.1億ドル
▷大型契約数が急増
▷米国商用部門が137%成長
▷既存顧客の利用拡大も加速
▷利益率も非常に高水準

特に注目したいのは、「Rule of 40」127%。

これは一般的なソフトウェア企業で40%以上なら優秀とされる指標。
127%は異次元。

さらに $PLTR 側はFY2026売上見通しを71.8〜72.0億ドルと提示し、マーケットの予想を10億ドル以上も上回ってる。
これはKarpを始めとする経営陣がかなり強気の成長を見込んでるってこと。

さらに言うと、その後も大型案件が連続。

▷米国国土安全保障省（DHS）10億ドル規模の契約
▷米国農務省（USDA）の3億ドル契約
▷軍事AIシステム「Maven」の拡大
▷ $NVDA との主権AIインフラ連携
▷Stellantis N.V.との契約拡大
▷GE AerospaceとのAI活用拡大

その中でも特に重要視したいのはMaven。
これは米軍向けAI戦場システムで、現在は事実上、戦場データ統合と意思決定支援の中核に近い存在。さらに米国防総省は関連予算を大幅に増額するって報道出てるし、 $PLTR が国家安全保障インフラに深く入り込んでいってる。

で、絶対伝えたいのは「Anthropic問題」。
もともとMavenでは、Anthropic PBC のClaudeがLLM層として使われてたのよ。でも、政府がAnthropicとの協力を停止したことで、「 $PLTR はAnthropic依存だから終わった」とか、熊さんたちが言い出した🐻

まあ実際のとこ $PLTR は短期間で他モデルへ切り替えを実施し、システムは継続稼働。

ここが非常に重要。重要。

これどういうことかって言うと、 $PLTR の価値は特定AIモデルそのものじゃなくて、

▷データ統合
▷アクセス制御
▷機密ネットワーク対応
▷現場運用
▷AIと人間の意思決定接続

を担う基盤部分にある、ってこと。

要するにLLMは交換可能で、その上に乗る“OS”のような役割を $PLTR が担ってるってこと。

なので「Claudeが使えなくなったら終わり」とかいう浅はかな主張は $PLTR を理解できてない。
実際、モデル切り替え後もMavenは継続運用されてるし、その後は国防総省側の正式プログラム化と予算拡大が進んだ。
これを「モデル非依存性が実戦レベルで証明された」ことを示してる。

$PLTR はいつも決算で証明してきてる。
マーケットは次も神決算を求めてる。

ポイントは、
▷売上がどこまで市場予想を超えるか
▷米国商用成長率が高水準を維持できるか
▷通期ガイダンスが再び引き上げられるか

まとめると $PLTR は単なるソフトウェア企業じゃなくて、国家・軍・大企業向けのAI運用基盤になりつつある。で、特定LLMに依存しない構造が実戦レベルで証明され始めてる。もしこの流れが続けば、市場の評価基準そのものが大きく変わる可能性がある。
つまりは地球を支配する企業になるかもね😏

tweet.text:
パラ友各位

2026年4月、 $PLTR の株主総会に向けて、宗教系・ESG系株主団体がある提案を提出しました。 
内容をまとめたのでお時間ある方はご一読下さい🐕
$PLTR #palantir #パランティア #米国株

ー内容はシンプルー
「 $PLTR の軍事・監視技術が、人権侵害や国際法違反に使われていないか、第三者による独立調査レポートを作成してほしい」という要求。

これは今までみたいな批判じゃなくて、実際に株主総会で議決対象となる正式な株主提案。

流れとしては、

①株主側が提案
②会社側が総会資料に掲載
③取締役会が賛否推奨
④株主投票

という形になる。

要するに株主総会の場で正式に問題提起されてるテーマ。

ー何の文書かー
これはSECルールに基づく「Exempt Solicitation」という文書。

簡単に言えば、「他の株主に、この議案へ賛成票を入れてほしい」と呼びかける文書。
この文書自体は $PLTR 側の公式声明ではなく、“株主提案側”の主張。

まあ、文書内でも「政府が最終責任を持つ」「予測警察ツールは提供していない」「防衛分野で倫理的に正しい結果を支援している」などなど $PLTR 側の主張も引用されてる。

構図としては、「 $PLTR はこう説明している。でも実態は違うよね？」っていう株主側の反論。

ー問題視されている①：ICEと移民監視ー
文書は、 $PLTR と米移民税関捜査局（ICE）の関係を批判してる。

背景として $PLTR は創業初期から米政府・情報機関・国土安全保障分野と深く結びついてる。

特に9.11後、米国では、「膨大なデータを統合し危険人物を特定したい」という需要が急増。
で、 $PLTR の強みは、人・場所・通信・移動などを繋ぎ、関係性を可視化できること。
これがまた法執行機関との相性が非常に良い。

一方、批判側は、「その技術が大規模監視社会を強化している」と主張。

ー問題視されている②：AI戦争とターゲティングー
文書は、 $PLTR の「Maven Smart System（MSS）」を強く問題視してる。

これは現代戦争の核心に関わる話。
Project Maven は米国防総省のAI軍事プロジェクトで、「ドローン映像」「衛星画像」「センサー情報」をAI解析して、敵を高速特定することを目的としてる。

現代戦は発見 → 分析 → 判断 → 攻撃の速度が重要。これを「キルチェーン」と呼ぶんだけど、 $PLTR の製品は、このキルチェーンを高速化できる。

だから軍から強く求められている。
文書では、ウクライナ、イスラエル、イラン攻撃などで $PLTR の技術が使われたと主張してる。

そして批判側は、「AIによる高速意思決定が民間人被害を増やしている」と懸念してるみたい。

ー問題視されている③：イスラエルとの関係ー
文書は $PLTR とイスラエル国防省の提携にも触れてる。ここで重要なのは $PLTR が単なる中立的SaaS企業ではない点。

Alex Karp は以前から、「西側民主主義を守る」という思想を強く語っています。

つまり $PLTR は、「西側国家安全保障陣営のソフトウェア企業」に近い。（というかそう。）
だから支持も強いけど反発もかなり強い。

ー問題視されている④：監視と予測警察ー
文書は、「 $PLTR は監視企業ではないと言うが、実質的には監視インフラを支えている」とも主張してる。
$PLTR 側は、「我々はツール提供者で、使うのは政府」という立場。
一方、批判側は、「そのツールがなければ監視システム自体が成立しない」と反論。

これはAI兵器・監視AI・顔認識など、今後さらに大きな論争テーマになる分野だと思う。

ー株主にとって何を意味するのかー
私が考えるに株主視点だと、この文書には大きく2つの意味がある。

1つ目は $PLTR が国家安全保障インフラの深部に入り込んでること。
軍・情報機関・国境管理・戦場AIなどなど、中核に関与していることがこの文書からも分かる。
これは競争優位の証拠。

2つ目は、ESG・規制・政治リスク。
文書だと欧州系ファンドの売却事例にも触れてる。
具体的には、ノルウェーとかオランダのファンドやら年金基金が $PLTR 株を売却してると。
要するに批判側は、「これは単なる倫理論争ではなく、大手機関投資家の資金流出につながり得る投資リスクだ」と主張してるってこと。

つまり $PLTR は今後も、人権・倫理・国際法を巡る政治的圧力にさらされ続ける可能性がある、と指摘してる。

とはいえ、 $PLTR に限らずこうしたESG系株主提案は米国では毎年大量に提出され、多くは否決されてる。

特に $PLTR は創業者側の議決権が強く、可決ハードルは高い。

ーまとめー
この戦国時代で「AI・戦争・監視・国家安全保障」という現代の巨大テーマの中心に $PLTR がいることを示している文書だと思う。

ほんとに $PLTR は普通のソフトウェア企業じゃない。国家の意思決定や安全保障インフラに深く入り込んでる。だからこそ、巨大な成長期待と、強い政治・倫理的論争の両方を抱えてる。

tweet.text:
$PLTR 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

“ should I stay or should I go?”

40 minutes of research reports in the same chat with Claude 

“Claude”

Straight answer based on everything we’ve worked through across all four reports — no research needed, this is a synthesis call.
HOLD if you own it. Small starter BUY if you don’t.
Here’s the logic in plain terms:
The expected value math is slightly negative (-0.6%). Bull 25%, Base 42%, Bear 33%. That’s not a screaming buy.
But — you’re not making a one-day bet. You’re deciding whether to own a piece of Palantir.
If you already own PLTR: HOLD. Selling at $138 to maybe rebuy at $115 only works if you actually pull the trigger on the dip. Most people don’t. And if the bull case hits Monday, you’ve sold the bottom.
If you don’t own any: buy 25–33% of your intended position today, leave the rest as dry powder for Tuesday. This captures the bull case (you participate in a $160+ gap) without eating the full bear case (you have cash to buy $115–125).
If you were going to go all-in today: don’t. The setup doesn’t support it. 227× trailing P/E, insiders selling $432M with zero buys, Q1 historically PLTR’s worst earnings quarter, options underpricing the move, and the market just punished Meta and Microsoft for clean beats.
What I would NOT do: buy a full position at $138 betting Monday is a guaranteed rip. The “$7B in new contracts” narrative didn’t hold up. The verifiable number is closer to $1.4B and most of it is ceilings, not bookings.
The honest version: if Palantir is a 5-year hold for you, $138 vs $125 vs $155 doesn’t matter much. If you’re trading the print, the asymmetry says size small.
Not financial advice. Your money, your call. 🫡

One account. Daily value. Real movement. @movver checks all the boxes.🕌🦯

 $SMR $PLTR https://t.co/uWkjPyxynP
